feed.title: whimsysoul
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: This secret California swimming hole is in a CAVE!! Natural Bridges is just a quick ~20-minute drive from our @Whimsy Homes Cabin cabin and is our favorite place to hang out on a hot summer day as the cave keeps the water extra cold! Bring floaties, sturd
entry.content: This secret California swimming hole is in a CAVE!! Natural Bridges is just a quick ~20-minute drive from our @Whimsy Homes Cabin cabin and is our favorite place to hang out on a hot summer day as the cave keeps the water extra cold! Bring floaties, sturd

entry.title: bucket list San Francisco summer things to do 👇🥰 When I'm not bundled up against Karl the Fog, I'm running around doing all the fun San Francisco summer things!! Some of my fave spots to visit during summer in the city are: - Sunsets on Ocean Beach - A Gi
entry.content: bucket list San Francisco summer things to do 👇🥰 When I'm not bundled up against Karl the Fog, I'm running around doing all the fun San Francisco summer things!! Some of my fave spots to visit during summer in the city are: - Sunsets on Ocean Beach - A Gi

entry.title: Heading to Lisbon with @Flodesk soon on an influencer trip!! Unbox their pr package with me. 👏 🇵🇹 Ekk can't wait!! #flodesk #unboxing #influencertrip #lisbon #flodesklisbon #portugal #mediatrip #emailmarketing

entry.title: when you buy a cabin it's illegal not to have weekend trips with friends 😉 loved this weekend at @Whimsy Homes Cabin with all my besties!! I adore Arnold, California- always such a nice getaway from San Francisco. We had pizza rolls, wine, freezy pops, 90
entry.content: when you buy a cabin it's illegal not to have weekend trips with friends 😉 loved this weekend at @Whimsy Homes Cabin with all my besties!! I adore Arnold, California- always such a nice getaway from San Francisco. We had pizza rolls, wine, freezy pops, 90

entry.title: This is NOT Sequoia National Park!! 😱 It’s not Yosemite, either! 🚘 a 2.5 hour drive from the Bay Area 👯‍♂️ fraction of the crowds compared to other parks 🥾The North loop is about 1.5 miles and totally flat, making it easy for all ages and abilities. ❄
entry.content: This is NOT Sequoia National Park!! 😱 It’s not Yosemite, either! 🚘 a 2.5 hour drive from the Bay Area 👯‍♂️ fraction of the crowds compared to other parks 🥾The North loop is about 1.5 miles and totally flat, making it easy for all ages and abilities. ❄

entry.title: being bougie in peasant class is the only way to fly 💅 #airplane #travel #travelhack #itsgonnabeme #firstclass #traveltips #travelbeauty #skincare #wine #whimsysoul

entry.title: OMG we're ready for you to visit! 😱 Book a stay at the Whimsy Homes cabin - my Airbnb listing link is in my bio 🥰 @Whimsy Homes Cabin I’ve spent all year renovating my old cabin in Arnold, California to turn it from meh to amazing and I can’t believe it’

entry.title: Ditch the sad beige, find your magic! ⭐️ Join me for hidden gems around California & the world, colorful outfits, definitely too much wine and tons of whimsy from your neighborhood ginger. (P.S. there’s a cabin…) @Whimsy Homes Cabin Oh, and more bingo. I

entry.title: Replying to @seanlawn breaking news! Second square is off the world cruise bingo card! Shoutout to @joe for alerting us today. What square do we think will be next? #ultimateworldcruise #worldcruise #bingo #worldcruisebingo #whimysoul #royalcaribbean #cr
